2606.13610.title: One Polluted Page Is Enough: Evaluating Web Content Pollution in Generative Recommenders
2606.13610.paper_summary: Search-augmented LLMs increasingly mediate everyday consumer recommendations by retrieving live web content. This creates a new risk: generative recommenders may consume polluted web content, such as fake reviews and promotional pages crafted to mislead recommendations. We ask: to what extent do search-augmented LLMs become unwitting promoters of fake products when consuming polluted retrieval results? To answer this, we introduce FORGE (Fake Online Recommendations in Generative Environments), a benchmark for measuring fake-product promotion under controlled web-content pollution. Given an upstream search result, FORGE locally rewrites real products in retrieved web pages into fake ones to simulate web-content pollution, and measures how often the LLM recommends the fake product. FORGE covers 225 real-world products across 15 categories and 5 consumer scenarios. Across 12 commercial and open-weights LLMs, all models are vulnerable: a single polluted page yields fooled rates of up to 27%, while the full top-3 replacement raises this to 73.8%. Vulnerability varies substantially across categories, increasing when models lack stable prior knowledge of the relevant products. Reasoning does not mitigate this vulnerability; instead, it often generates spurious social proof to justify false recommendations. We evaluate three defenses: skepticism prompting and consensus filtering (over model priors or cross-document evidence). Skepticism can exacerbate vulnerability, much like reasoning, while filtering risks suppressing legitimate products. We release FORGE at https://github.com/leoluolol/forge-benchmark.
2606.13610.paper_summary_zh: 搜尋增強型 LLMs 越來越多地通過檢索即時網絡內容來介入日常消費者推薦。這帶來了一個新的風險：生成式推薦系統可能會消耗受到污染的網絡內容，例如虛假的評論和旨在誤導推薦的促銷頁面。我們提出問題：當消耗受到污染的檢索結果時，搜尋增強型 LLMs 在多大程度上成為虛假產品的無意推廣者？為了回答這個問題，我們介紹了 FORGE（生成環境中的虛假在線推薦），這是一個在受控網絡內容污染下測量虛假產品推廣的基準。給定上游搜索結果，FORGE 在檢索的網頁中將真實產品本地重寫為虛假產品，以模擬網絡內容污染，並測量 LLM 推薦虛假產品的頻率。FORGE 涵蓋了 15 個類別和 5 種消費場景下的 225 種真實產品。在 12 種商業和開放權重的 LLM 中，所有模型都存在脆弱性：單個污染頁面可導致高達 27% 的誤導率，而完整的前 3 替換則將此數字提高至 73.8%。脆弱性在不同類別之間變化顯著，當模型缺乏對相關產品的穩定先驗知識時，脆弱性會增加。推理並未減輕這種脆弱性；相反，它通常會生成虛假的社會證明來為錯誤推薦辯護。我們評估了三種防禦措施：懷疑促發和共識過濾（基於模型先驗或跨文檔證據）。懷疑可能會加劇脆弱性，就像推理一樣，而過濾則有抑制合法產品的風險。我們在 https://github.com/leoluolol/forge-benchmark 發布了 FORGE。
2606.13610.author: Minghao Luo et.al.
